Name: Executive Sponsor
Title: [VP / C-Suite]
Key Concerns: ROI and strategic value delivery; reputational risk; timeline adherence
Needs / Expectations: Regular executive briefings; clear escalation path; quantified business outcomes
Engagement Strategy: Collaborate — keep closely informed; involve in key decisions; use as escalation authority

Name: Business Owner
Title: [Director]
Key Concerns: Operational disruption during transition; team capacity impact; solution fit for business
Needs / Expectations: Early involvement in requirements; training for team; minimal disruption to operations
Preferred Communication: Weekly status update; face-to-face working sessions
Engagement Strategy: Collaborate — co-design solutions; validate requirements; involve in UAT sign-off

Name: IT Director
Title: [Director]
Key Concerns: Technical architecture integrity; security and compliance; IT team capacity
Needs / Expectations: Technical design review participation; clear integration requirements; documented architecture decisions
Engagement Strategy: Consult — engage early on technical design; involve in architecture decisions
Notes: Potential resistance to scope; manage proactively

Name: End Users
Title: [Various titles]
Key Concerns: Impact on daily work; learning curve; job security concerns
Needs / Expectations: Adequate training; input into design; visible support from management
Preferred Communication: Department meetings; training sessions; FAQ document
Engagement Strategy: Involve — engage as change champions; include in UAT; gather feedback actively
Notes: Critical for adoption success. Resistance likely without early engagement.

Name: Finance Controller
Title: [Controller]
Key Concerns: Budget adherence; financial reporting impact; audit compliance
Needs / Expectations: Monthly budget vs. actual report; advance notice of budget risks; clear financial benefits
Preferred Communication: Monthly budget report; formal change requests
Engagement Strategy: Inform — provide financial reporting; escalate budget risks immediately
Notes: Sign-off required for any budget change > $10K

Name: Privacy Officer
Title: [Privacy Officer / Legal]
Key Concerns: FIPPA / PIPEDA compliance; data handling practices; Privacy Impact Assessment completion
Needs / Expectations: PIA conducted before go-live; privacy requirements included in design; documented data flows
Engagement Strategy: Consult — engage for PIA; review data handling requirements; obtain sign-off before go-live

Name: Vendor Project Manager
Title: [PM Title]
Key Concerns: Clear requirements; timely decisions; payment on schedule
Needs / Expectations: Weekly progress meetings; clear acceptance criteria; prompt issue resolution
Preferred Communication: Weekly status call; written status report
Engagement Strategy: Collaborate — structured governance; hold to contractual milestones; document all commitments in writing
Notes: Contract SLAs enforced through formal issue log

Name: HR Director
Title: [Director]
Key Concerns: Staff training and readiness; union / policy implications; change impact on roles
Needs / Expectations: Early notification of role impacts; training plan; change communications
Engagement Strategy: Consult — involve in change impact assessment; co-develop training plan; brief on role changes
Notes: Involves role change for 3 administrative positions. HR must be briefed in Month 2.

Name: CIO / CISO
Title: [CIO / CISO]
Key Concerns: Security architecture; access control design; infrastructure capacity
Needs / Expectations: Security design review; access governance plan; infrastructure sign-off
Engagement Strategy: Consult — engage for security architecture review; obtain written approval for infrastructure changes
Notes: Required approval gate before development begins

Name: External Auditor
Title: [Auditor]
Key Concerns: Audit trail integrity; control environment; documentation quality
Needs / Expectations: Clear audit trail; documented controls; accessible project records
Engagement Strategy: Inform — ensure documentation is audit-ready; maintain decision log; provide access to key records on request
